title: 88Pcs Wooden Train Tracks set wooden Railway Train Station Set Electric Train Wooden Train Toys Free Thomas for Kids 3+ Years Old Girls Boys
features: 👍Ideal wooden toys for kids boys girls aged 3+: Suitable for kids age 3+ , use under adult supervision.
🚄 Wooden train with cargo, bridge, people and trees - Discover an exciting new train set that contains enough pieces (88 pcs) for your child's imagination
🚂 The wooden toys is compatible with many major trains set brands as Brio Bigjigs Ikea. The cars can also be push to run on the floor.
🚇Made from 100%, ECO-Friendly wood. It complies with all EU Toy Safety Standards. Pls rest assured to purchase.
🚉Wooden train set contains 1 Electric train, 2cars, 1 Truck, 1 Wooden Thomas with Police station,Train Station street , people and trees and more to integrate with the train set.
description: Product Description Our 88-piece Wooden Train Track Set is designed to ignite the imagination of children aged 3 and above. With a vibrant assortment of trains, cars, and city-themed accessories, this set offers endless possibilities for creative play. Your child can build tracks, navigate the electric train, and role-play scenarios with police stations, train stations, people, and more, developing essential motor skills and hand-eye coordination along the way. Crafted with durable wood and meeting EU Toy Safety Standards, this train set is both safe and long-lasting. Parents can rest assured knowing that each piece is made to provide a wholesome and responsible choice for your child’s playtime. Bring the charm of a bustling city to your child’s play area! This set includes realistic elements like a police cruiser, ambulance, city vehicles, road signs, and even trees, allowing kids to create an engaging, miniature cityscape. Each accessory is thoughtfully designed to be child-friendly and durable, encouraging hours of exploration and role-playing. Whether it’s the police station for heroic rescues or the train station for transporting passengers, this train set offers a complete city experience that fuels creativity and storytelling. It's the perfect gift for kids who love trains, cars, and building their own little world. Difficulty level 1 Track Size 44x44cm Difficulty level 2 Track Size 83x46cm Difficulty level 3 Track Size 96x40cm Difficulty level 4 Track Size 106x55cm Our wooden train set is compatible with other popular train brands such as Brio, Bigjigs, and IKEA, offering flexibility and expandability. This set includes an electric train, wooden Thomas, and additional vehicles that can even be pushed to run on flat surfaces, adding another layer of interactive fun. Kids can expand their collection by integrating this set with other brand pieces, creating larger tracks and more complex setups. This open-ended compatibility makes it a great choice for children who already enjoy other train sets, giving them even more room to build and explore. 26 high-quality barbless wooden train tracks , 3 battery powered train toys, 2 city vehicle toys (police car, taxi), magnetic trains,character toys, trees, assemblable houses, and traffic signs that simulate the city's railroad system. This wooden trains set for kids will be a favorite of boys and girls train fans Train track wooden set can fit various brands of train sets, such as Thomas, Brio, Melissa & Doug, IKEA, Chuggington, etc. Can be perfectly placed on the train track with stable operation. The excellent train set design makes the track connection tight, reducing train derailment and track breakage, and the wheels and track are designed to fit 100% so that the train can run smoothly. Our toy trains and wooden train tracks make great holiday gifts for toddler boys and girls and are ideal for Christmas, birthday gifts, children's day and party gifts. Great educational learning toys for boys and girls ages 4-7. this kids train and magnetic train track accessories are durable and will last for generations. 4 5 6 7 year olds can use their imagination to easily assemble their own special train track by snapping two different types of straight or curved rails together to form a circular or oval layout. We believe that wooden toys promote the development of children's logical thinking, problem solving, creative thinking, hand-eye coordination and fine motor skills. This wooden train set is more than just a toy; it’s a tool for skill-building and social interaction. Playing with this set can help children develop fine motor skills, spatial awareness, and even basic problem-solving skills as they navigate trains through tracks and obstacles. Designed for solo play or family bonding time, this set also encourages parent-child interaction. Join your little one on their adventure, and enjoy quality time together while nurturing their creativity and building important skills. Perfect for sparking imagination, this train set brings endless joy and development to any playroom.
